title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 214.180 - Shall keep record of receipts and disbursements
text:
214.180.  Shall keep record of receipts and disbursements. — The clerk of the commission shall keep in a separate record book all receipts and disbursements of each and every trust fund or funds and a detailed account of the management of the same.
(RSMo 1939 § 15271) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 14062
